_note: DatasetSchema (analytics semantic layer). Consumer: @objectstack/service-analytics — compileDataset() turns a dataset into a Cube, DatasetExecutor runs the query. Seeded from a dataset-property consumer audit (file:line evidence in service-analytics). ADR-0054: dimensions.dateGranularity carries the org-timezone date-bucketing proof (#1982/#2018). Framework provenance/lock fields auto-live.

label.note: compiled into Cube title for presentations.

description.note: display/doc metadata (presentations); not read by analytics execution.

object.note: base table — Cube sql + join resolution + draft-rows resolver.

include.note: compiled into Cube joins + the NativeSQLStrategy join allowlist (ADR-0021).

filter.note: dataset-level WHERE, ANDed with runtime + measure-scoped filters.

label.note: compiled into Cube dimension for presentations.

field.note: emitted as the dimension's SQL column reference (relationship-validated).

type.note: dimensionType() maps to Cube time/number/boolean/string; drives grouping.

dateGranularity.note: ADR-0054 high-risk class (analytics): a time dimension's single granularity auto-buckets at query time (dataset-executor.ts:272-287); the proof asserts the day bucket SHIFTS with the org timezone (2024-03-01T03:00Z buckets to 2024-02-29 in America/Los_Angeles) — guarding the analytics-strategy ↔ in-memory count ↔ REST exec-context integration that #2018 fixed.

label.note: compiled into Cube metric + enriched onto result fields.

aggregate.note: aggregateToMetricType() → Cube metric type (sum/count/avg/…); unsupported aggregates throw.

field.note: SQL aggregate operand (count omits field → '*'); relationship-validated.

filter.note: measure-scoped WHERE, applied via a supplementary per-measure query.

format.note: compiled into Cube metric + enriched onto result fields for the renderer.

certified.evidence: no runtime consumer — analytics execution never reads it; not compiled into the Cube
certified.note: measure trust/governance flag, declared but unenforced (ADR-0049 enforce-or-remove candidate). Not authorWarn'd: it may surface as an objectui badge, so it is not necessarily misleading.

derived.note: post-aggregation arithmetic (ratio/sum/difference/product) over base measures; {op, of} both consumed.
